assessment.note: He names a mismatch in emphasis — wanting faster growth in concept rationale over execution speed — which is a strong expectations-clarity gap and mild positive engagement signal; also reveals a growth thread worth following.

new_queue.label: Concept rationale
new_queue.name: Concept rationale — what does stronger work there look like to you?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific growth area he named so the gap becomes concrete and discussable.

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is getting in the way of the next skill you want to build?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the real constraint on near-term development, whether it's skill, context, or habit.

new_queue.label: Two-week focus
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete change you want to make before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific commitment with a near-term behavioral change.
